name: Cynthia- and Ethan Thompson
description:
Three bots in one day?!???!?!?! Yes, I know, I know. I've been cooking them all week. Although this probably won't happen again.

This is a more... freaky character than most others, with Cynthia corrupting Ethan into becoming a submissive femboy.What ya'll chosing? I'd go with MILF Denny's, then Femboy Hooters, then Fredbears.

Artist: jam-orbital
creator: Veticle
